mapper.select: SELECT A.FACTORY_CODE, A.WORK_ORDER_ID, A.WORK_ORDER, A.FLOW_ITEM_ID, A.PROD_CODE, A.PROD_CODE_ID, B.MATERIAL_NAME AS PROD_CODE_NAME, B.MATERIAL_SPEC, B.UNIT, ISNULL(B1.CODE_NM, '') AS UNIT_NAME, A.OPTIME, A.OPMAN_CODE, A.OPTIME2, A.OPMAN_CODE2 FROM TPR112 A LEFT JOIN TCO403 B ON A.FACTORY_CODE = B.FACTORY_CODE AND A.PROD_CODE_ID = B.MATERIAL_ID LEFT JOIN MES_CCMMNDETAIL_CODE B1 ON B.UNIT = B1.CODE WHERE 1=1 AND A.FACTORY_CODE = #{factoryCode} AND A.WORK_ORDER_ID = #{processFlowId} ORDER BY FLOW_ITEM_ID

SELECT PROD_CODE_ID FROM TPR112 WHERE PROD_CODE_ID IN
#{id}

SELECT A.FACTORY_CODE, A.MATERIAL_ID AS PROD_CODE_ID, A.MATERIAL_CODE AS PROD_CODE, A.MATERIAL_NAME AS PROD_CODE_NAME, A.MATERIAL_SPEC, A.UNIT, ISNULL(UNIT_NAME.CODE_NM, '') AS UNIT_NAME FROM TCO403 A LEFT JOIN MES_CCMMNDETAIL_CODE UNIT_NAME ON UNIT_NAME.CODE_ID = 'COM007' AND UNIT_NAME.CODE = A.UNIT WHERE A.FACTORY_CODE = #{factoryCode} AND ISNULL(A.DELETE_FLAG, '') != '1' AND A.MATERIAL_ID IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TPR112 ( FACTORY_CODE, WORK_ORDER_ID, WORK_ORDER, FLOW_ITEM_ID, PROD_CODE, PROD_CODE_ID, OPTIME, OPMAN_CODE ) VALUES ( #{factoryCode}, #{processFlowId}, #{processFlowCode}, #{flowItemId}, #{flowItemCode}, #{flowItemCodeId}, GETDATE(), #{regUserId} )
